response.justification: Strong senior full-stack profile with 13+ years of experience, well exceeding the 6+ year requirement. Direct hands-on experience with the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) plus recent AI-agent infrastructure work including MCP code generators, which directly matches the AI agent development requirement. Polyglot background (TS, Java, Python-adjacent, D, C/C++) demonstrates adaptability across the secondary Kotlin/Java needs. Solid testing, TDD, and craftsmanship orientation aligns with the role's quality expectations.
strengths: Direct TypeScript/Node.js/React experience plus current AI-agent and MCP tooling work
Strong testing/TDD background with workshop-level expertise (Selenium, fluent-asserts, Trial)
Polyglot engineer with backend depth (microservices at scale, MongoDB, Docker, K8s)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest mentioned in resume (Jest/general testing implied)
Kotlin not listed; Java experience is older (robotic arms era)
Heavy use of D (DLang) in past roles may indicate stack preferences outside primary needs
